entries.headline: Risk-Off Persists Into Pre-Market — Dollar and VIX Both Elevated
entries.dominantStory: Equity futures are sliding as the dollar strengthens and VIX holds above 26. The macro backdrop remains unfavorable for risk assets, with inflationary pressure from crude unresolved and breadth failing to confirm the prior session's index bounce. Treasury yields are rising at the front end, suggesting the market is pricing out rate cuts for H1.
crossAssetConnections: VIX ↑ + breadth weakness → confirms risk-off tone, not sector rotation
Dollar strength → EM capital outflow risk, commodity import cost pressure
10Y yield ↑ 6bps → duration assets under pressure, growth stocks most exposed
WTI > $87 → inflation re-acceleration narrative intact — Fed hawkish hold likely
whatChangedSinceLastReport: BTC dropped 1.5% from evening session — crypto risk appetite retreating
10Y yield pushed to 4.52% — above prior watch level of 4.45%
SPX futures -0.38% at open — below prior support at 5800
entries.operatorPosture: DEFENSIVE — reduce duration exposure, hold USD, watch crude for confirmation of sustained inflation pressure above $87 WTI.
watchNext: CPI print — any upside surprise re-accelerates dollar + yield move
SPX 5750 support — loss triggers next leg risk-off
BTC < $80K — confirms crypto risk-off alignment with equities
Fed speakers: any hawkish tilt hardens risk-off regime
entries.confidenceCommentary: Regime confidence 78% — dominant signal is volatility stress + dollar, but growth picture ambiguous. Watch breadth improvement as primary invalidation signal.
uncertaintyFlags: Earnings season residual: some beat-driven pockets of strength could mask broad weakness
Geopolitical tail risk: oil supply disruption premium not fully priced

entries.headline: Asian Session Closes With Broad Selling — Dollar at 3-Week High
entries.dominantStory: Asian equities sold off broadly, led by Nikkei -1.2% and Hang Seng -0.9%. Dollar strength is the primary pressure vector, with DXY approaching 104. Oil held firm above $86. European futures are showing early weakness ahead of the NY open.
crossAssetConnections: Nikkei -1.2% + JPY weakness → BOJ uncertainty adding to regional pressure
Dollar ↑ → EM FX stress — Asian export currencies under pressure
Oil holding $86+ → global inflation floor intact
Gold ↑ $12 → safe haven bid confirming risk-off, not just USD strength
whatChangedSinceLastReport: DXY broke above 103.9 resistance during Asian session
Nikkei erased prior day gains entirely
BTC held $83K — crypto not yet in full risk-off alignment
entries.operatorPosture: CAUTIOUS — no new risk exposure. Monitor EU open for risk-off confirmation or reversal.
watchNext: EU PMI data: miss accelerates risk-off
DXY 104.5 — next resistance if dollar move continues
entries.confidenceCommentary: Early session with thinner volume. Signals directionally consistent with risk-off but conviction lower at 3AM run. Wait for NY open confirmation.
uncertaintyFlags: Asia session volume lower — moves may not hold into NY open
